questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Privilege Rings?
options: Inefficient scaling of User Mode (Ring 3) vs Kernel Mode (Ring 0) execution controls.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of User Mode (Ring 3) vs Kernel Mode (Ring 0) execution controls.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how User Mode (Ring 3) vs Kernel Mode (Ring 0) execution controls scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
